more_cobblemon_tweaks.config.option.egg_: If Enhanced Egg Lore is enabled, and an egg's encrypted, should MoreCobblemonTweaks warn you in the lore that it cannot read the egg's data?
more_cobblemon_tweaks.config.option.enha: Adds lore describing various information about the pokemon contained in an egg.
more_cobblemon_tweaks.config.option.mini: Minimum IV Egg Indicator requires Enhanced Egg Lore to be enabled!
If Enhanced Egg Lore is enabled, should it display if an egg has all 0 IVs with a red hazard triangle?
more_cobblemon_tweaks.config.option.pc_b: If enabled, adds a button to the PC to allow opening a pc box view.
more_cobblemon_tweaks.config.option.pc_c: Colored IVs requires IV Display to be enabled!
If enabled, the IVs in the iv display will be colored matching their respective power items.
more_cobblemon_tweaks.config.option.pc_i: Adds a small widget to the pc menu showing the iv's of the previewed pokemon.
more_cobblemon_tweaks.config.option.pc_m: If enabled, adds a button to the PC to allow selecting multiple pokemon at once for moving or releasing.
more_cobblemon_tweaks.config.option.perf: Perfect IV Egg Indicator requires Enhanced Egg Lore to be enabled!
If Enhanced Egg Lore is enabled, should it display if an egg has perfect IVs with a aqua triangle?
more_cobblemon_tweaks.config.option.shin: Shiny Egg Indicator requires Enhanced Egg Lore to be enabled!
If Enhanced Egg Lore is enabled, should it display if an egg is shiny with a gold star?
more_cobblemon_tweaks.config.option.text: Text Egg Indicators requires Enhanced Egg Lore to be enabled!
If Enhanced Egg Lore is enabled, and an egg has any of the previous indicators, should they render as text instead of symbols?
more_cobblemon_tweaks.config.option.wait: Waiting on cobblemon egg side-mods to update to 1.7.1!
⚠ Disable egg encryption in the server host's cobbreeding config and right-click to decrypt!
⚠ Disable egg encryption in your cobbreeding config and right-click to decrypt!
⚠ Unable to read egg data due to encryption!
⚠ MoreCobblemonTweaks errored repeatedly trying to read this egg's data. Make sure MoreCobblemonTweaks is up to date!
⚠ If it is, please report this on github. You may also want to disable enhanced egg lore until it's fixed.
